New York, NY • CASE STUDY
PRIVATE RESIDENCE METRICS

Corporate Monolith

“A massive spatial atrium featuring geometric concrete, high timber, and glass grids.”

PROJECT METRICS & RATINGS
DIMENSIONS

185,000 SQFT

COMPLETION

Q2 2023

FACADE COMPOSITION

Brutalist Cast Concrete

LOCATION

New York, NY

THE STRUCTURAL DIALOGUE

Harmonizing weight with gravity.

The Corporate Monolith redefines the civic workspace as an active ecosystem. Built from cold cast-in-place architectural concrete, the brutalist envelope is balanced by a magnificent interior core of sustainably sourced Nordic Spruce. A massive, central floating sculptural staircase loops upwards throughout the three-story atrium, facilitating collision points and collaboration fields for high-tech institutions. Skylights utilize smart electrochromic glass that tints dynamically based on solar angles, maintaining a perfect climate and natural daylight throughout the year.

“A precise alignment of structural load lines protects interior spatial integrity, forming an ambient buffer zone with local environmental elements.”

Material Palette Analysis:

01
Brutalist Cast ConcreteCurated, zero-decay finish matching structural weight properties. Highly reflective thermal glass integrations.
02
Sustainable Nordic SpruceCurated, zero-decay finish matching structural weight properties. Highly reflective thermal glass integrations.
03
High-Performance Double GlazingCurated, zero-decay finish matching structural weight properties. Highly reflective thermal glass integrations.
